title: Note Frontmatter v1
description: YAML frontmatter for every note in the vault. Domain-neutral. The 'id' (ULID) is the durable source-of-truth key for links, chunks, and provenance; filenames may carry an optional human slug but the id never changes. Unknown properties are preserved (Obsidian-compatible, forward-compatible).

ulid.description: Canonical ULID: 26-char Crockford base32, time-sortable, filename-safe, immutable once assigned.

id.description: Stable, sortable, filename-safe note id. Durable key for links/chunks/provenance. Never changes.

type.description: Note type. Domain-neutral. Determines its memory layer and required fields.

layer.description: Memory layer L0-L5. L0 (raw) is immutable; L4 indexes are not notes. Each type pins its layer (see allOf).

title.description: Human-readable title. Required for curated/derived note types (see allOf).

tags.description: Free-form tags. Feeds retrieval/organization; not a substitute for the id.

aliases.description: Alternate names/titles (Obsidian-compatible). Useful for entity notes.

updated.description: ISO-8601 last-edit timestamp. Absent or equal to 'created' for never-edited notes. Must not be set on raw (L0) notes.

source_ref.description: Provenance: id of the single raw capture / source this note directly derives from. Required for working (L1) notes.

sources.description: Provenance: ids of all L0-L3 sources an output cites. Required (non-empty) for output (L5) notes.

links.description: Outgoing [[wikilink]] targets (note ids or titles). Seeds the graph index.

entities.description: Ids of entity notes referenced by this note. Seeds the entity/graph index.

status.description: Optional lifecycle marker (e.g. active/archived). Domain-neutral; no workflow is enforced here.

secure_ref.description: Pointer to external secure storage. Never inline sensitive content in the note.

media.description: Auditable, non-leaking media provenance on a transcript L0 note (EPIC-CORE-013). Mirrors media_reference.schema.json; no raw-locator field is representable.

allOf.$comment: raw (L0) — immutable source material; no 'updated' allowed.
working (L1) — must reference its L0 source.
project (L1 or L2) — organizing PARA note.
output (L5) — generated output; must cite its sources.
